title: NUPENG Leadership Crisis Deepens As Port Harcourt Zone Accuses President, General Secretary Of Abuse Office, Threat To Life - FinancialEDGE
description: The leadership crisis within the Nigeria Union of Petroleum and Natural Gas Workers (NUPENG) has taken a new twist just as leaders of the Port Harcourt Zone of the union unanimously passed a vote of no confidence on the President and the General Secretary of the union. The zonal leaders in an emergency meeting
html: The leadership crisis within the Nigeria Union of Petroleum and Natural Gas Workers (NUPENG) has taken a new twist just as leaders of the Port Harcourt Zone of the union unanimously passed a vote of no confidence on the President and the General Secretary of the union.
